text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for inviting me to join you, Trainer.
This has been just the change of pace I needed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My schedule has been a little too full of late, so I
welcome the—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President! There you are!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, Air Groove. How can I help?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Is the draft for the revisions to this year's event
schedule complete?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I'm not mistaken, we decided at the last council
meeting that you would write the outline and I
would do the rest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh... Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...President?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Sorry, it's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe I left it in my dorm room. Would you be
so kind as to wait in the student council office for
a moment?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: This is quite the quandary...
choice_data_list: Did you forget to do it?
Did you forget to do it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite the opposite, actually. I finished the whole
thing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The form is already finalized and proofread.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: To be clear, I didn't forget I had to hand it over to Air Groove. But the work was progressing so smoothly that, in the heat of the moment...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: In a word, yes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Air Groove won't be pleased. She's warned me more than once about monopolizing the student council workload...
choice_data_list: I think we can come up with some kind of story.
We should be honest with her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you mean... deceive her? I could never...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But, then again... Yes, I see. The truth would only
cause her needless anxiety.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Your counsel is wise as always. I see now that the
high road is not always the best one.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's settled, then. We will keep this a secret from
Air Groove—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And what secret is that, President?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A-Air Groove! I didn't see you there!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I thought you were acting oddly, so I came back,
and what do I find but you two conspiring!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It seems you both need to be reminded of the
virtues of honesty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As promised, we both receive a very thorough lecture from Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And risk her wrath? Surely not. When the Empress
rages, even the Emperor quails...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she says, but is it really so bad to have friends
willing to keep you in line?
choice_data_list: It sounds like she cares about you.
It sounds like she cares about you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? Haha, perhaps she does!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Although her "care" can be fearsome at times! Ha
ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Is this really a laughing matter?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... I'm terribly sorry. I would not trade your
scoldings for the world.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's nothing for it but to face the music.
I'll be back once I have made my apologies.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So, it would appear you did everything yourself...
again.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
How many times have I told you that we need to
share the workload? You truly are hopeless.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have nothing to say in my defense. I can only
apologize.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Those who lead have a duty to delegate labor
appropriately. I see that now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, there is that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But seeing as you clearly feel remorse, I suppose I
can refrain from scolding you further.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, I would like you to bear one thing in
mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just as you strive for the happiness of all the
students...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So too do we hope for yours. Remember that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...And as she said that, I realized something.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I still have a long way to go as a leader.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's voice is low, but there's a smile
on her lips.
